verdict.answer_first: A states the actionable answer in the first heading: "Do this first: reorder your Dockerfile so dependencies are cached separately from source"
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to one fix by stating other options are a "second-order optimization that only matters once caching is working at all"
verdict.actionability: A's side-by-side `❌ SLOW` vs `✅ FAST` code blocks provide a clear visual diff that is instantly understandable and applicable.
